steps.title: Identify the negative direction
steps.content: The researchers connect reduced mind-wandering directly to creativity—and their finding that video meetings are “less conducive to brainstorming” establishes that this reduced wandering has a negative effect on creative thinking.

steps.title: Match the negative effect
steps.content:
The blank needs a word expressing harmful impact. Impede means to hinder or obstruct, capturing exactly how restricted attention harms creativity.

The other choices either express positive effects (recommend and construct) or misidentify the relationship (criticize).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
